name: External Initialization of Trusted Variables or Data Stores
description: The product initializes critical internal variables or data stores using inputs that can be modified by untrusted actors. An attacker could manipulate these externally-sourced values to influence system behavior, potentially modifying sensitive application data.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or EXTERNAL node provides input that flows directly into a STORAGE node (trusted variable or data store) without passing through a TRANSFORM node that sanitizes or validates the input, and without an AUTH or CONTROL node that restricts who can set the initial values.
